productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Adi Cliff Red Flip Flops
description: Bright Adi Cliff flip flops from adidas for casual occasions. While the textured footbed massages your feet whenever you walk, the textile thong straps sit comfortably on the upper of your foot, pampering your feet.UpperSynthetic and fabric thong straps with stitch detailing for snug Fit and protection from abrasionFabric toe separator to support the footadidas 3-Stripe on the separator for styleFoam footbed with graphics and brand mark for cushioned all-day comfort and styleOutsoleTPU outsole with geometric textured lugs for greater grip and stabilityFlip flop careWipe off dirt with a moist clothDo not machine wash
